checklist: Run the generated NSIS setup executable.
Launch AgentMux from the installed shortcut or Start menu entry.
Confirm diagnostics export works from the installed app.
Confirm a native shell pane can be created.
Close AgentMux and uninstall it through Windows Apps settings or the generated uninstaller.
Confirm the installed shortcut or Start menu entry no longer launches AgentMux.

needs_attention: manual install/uninstall smoke still requires an intentional human pass
installed AgentMux CLI sidecars are missing: agentmux, cmux
installed AgentMux install directory is not on the Windows user PATH
clean-machine WSL matrix has unobserved states: wsl_exe_missing, no_wsl_distribution, wsl_without_tmux
one or more integration doctor checks need attention
